ip_outcome_note: Confirmed. Orbeetle is a Game Freak-internal species (National Pokedex no. 826, Generation VIII, Galar). Stage 2 Bug/Psychic type, final form of Blipbug > Dottler > Orbeetle. No external IP concern.

trivia_bullets.text: Orbeetle is National Pokedex no. 826, a dual Bug/Psychic type introduced in Generation VIII (Galar). It is the Stage 2 final evolution of Blipbug > Dottler > Orbeetle, leveling from Dottler at level 30. [Pokemondb.net: Orbeetle, via WebSearch; Bulbapedia: Orbeetle, via WebSearch]
Flavor text (this print): "It emits psychic energy to observe and study what's around it—and what's around it can include things over six miles away." [Frontmatter flavor_text field, PokemonTCG.io]

Orbeetle's design draws from the ladybug (Coccinella septempunctata) for its spotted shell, and from UFO / alien stereotypes for its oversized orb and mind-control abilities. Its Gigantamax form enlarges the orb into a flying-saucer silhouette — an explicit alien-ship reference in official Pokedex text. [Pokemon GO Hub: Orbeetle Lore and Design, via WebSearch]
sources: Pokemon GO Hub: Orbeetle Lore and Design

trivia_bullets.text: The Evomancy attack on this card (search deck for a Stage 2 Pokemon per Energy attached) is one of the most strategically unusual attacks in the Sword & Shield era — it lets you bypass the evolution chain and place fully evolved Stage 2s directly on the bench. Pokemon.com featured it in a Triple Play deckbuilding article at set launch. [Pokemon.com: Triple Play featuring Orbeetle BST, via WebSearch]

related_cards.name: Orbeetle VMAX
related_cards.note: VMAX version in the same Sword & Shield generation; Gigantamax form with flying-saucer design
